channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Best Apps for Focus (2026): Focus Friend, Forest, Focus Traveller
item.description: Distractions? What distractions? Here are our recommendations for apps that help you stay focused on the task at hand.

item.title: iPhone loyalty just hit a new high with only 3.6% of iOS users thinking of switching — but here's why I'm never ditching Android
item.description: iPhone owners are more committed than ever to the Apple ecosystem, but I'm sticking with Google.

item.title: Ce SSD portable 1 To compatible MagSafe voit son prix chuter après une brutale hausse
item.description: Comme pour de nombreux SSD récemment, le prix du Lexar ES5 de 1 To avait nettement augmenté. Mais en ce moment, ce SSD portable compatible MagSafe est affiché en promotion à 159,98 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: The US gets the worst phones
item.description: Apple and Samsung dominate the US phone market, and they've done so for years. Together with Google, they've shaped our sense of what a smartphone is and what it can do, pushing the boundaries of mobile photography, software, and processing power. But over the last few years, they've sat back, content to iterate rather than […]

item.title: 'I snap them up' — award-winning wildlife photographer explains why he collects second-hand DSLRs for his unique 'Camtraptions' devices, and why they are a better choice over modern mirrorless cameras
item.description: The winner of this year's Sony World Photography Award Wildlife category explains why old DSLRs are choice gear for camera trap wildlife photography

item.title: Vampire Crawlers, Peter Molyneux's return and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. If you're looking for something new to play this weekend, we've got a bunch of options for you. We've also got some interesting upcoming games to tell you about as well.In a press release announcing that Playdate Season 3 is coming later this year, Panic included a line that I've been thinking about a lot this week. "Panic is currently relieved and happy that people can make amazing games for Playdate with just 16 megabytes of RAM," it said, a nod toward the ongoing RAM crisis.The Playdate doesn't exactly have a lot of t...

item.title: Here’s how to learn from failure—without being consumed by it
item.description: This four-part framework can show you the way. The missed promotion. The botched presentation. The project that went sideways despite our best efforts. We’ve all been there, stuck in what I call failure’s funk: that heavy mix of shame, fear, and paralysis that keeps us replaying mistakes long after they’ve passed.

item.title: Test du Netgear Nighthawk 5G M7 : le routeur de voyage
item.description: Plus qu’un simple routeur de voyage, le Netgear Nighthawk 5G M7 est aussi un véritable gestionnaire de carte eSIM, avec marketplace intégrée. Une vraie bonne idée ?

item.title: ‘Saros’ Shows Off the PS5’s DualSense Tricks
item.description: The new game from the creators of Returnal goes all-in on the PlayStation’s haptics and 3D audio. Maybe it will catch on with other game developers.

item.title: Discord Sleuths Gained Unauthorized Access to Anthropic’s Mythos
item.description: Plus: Spy firms tap into a global telecom weakness to track targets, 500,000 UK health records go up for sale on Alibaba, Apple patches a revealing notification bug, and more.

item.title: Soundcore's brand-new headphones are so good at noise cancelling, I don't want to stop using them
item.description: The Anker Soundcore Space 2 have a fantastic feature set and comfy design, even if the sound quality isn't the absolute best.

item.title: Independent Bookstore Day: Bookshop.org founder on how small retailers are taking on Amazon
item.description: After 20 years of declining numbers, indie booksellers in the U.S. have come ‘roaring back,’ says Andy Hunter. Independent bookstores are beacons of hope, offering intangible commodities such as connection, empathy, and knowledge, in addition to physical books.

item.title: The Online Civil War About ‘Michael’ Is a Battle Over Truth
item.description: Fans want to reclaim the music and myth of Michael Jackson in the new biopic while critics call for accountability. Who’s right?

item.title: Here’s how to decide when travel insurance is worth it
item.description: Travel insurance protects your wallet, health, and time against the unexpected. But how can you decide if the protection is worth the cost? My earliest memory of travel insurance was the life insurance vending machines that used to populate airports up until the early 1980s. For those too young to remember this bizarre part of 20th century air travel, these kiosks offered very short-term life insurance policies that cost $2.50 (paid in quarters) for coverage of up to $62,500....

item.title: What earnings for America’s largest homebuilder reveal about the housing market
item.description: Deploying bigger incentives and slowing starts, D.R. Horton was able to shrink its count of unsold completed homes by 35%. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Cette fonction cachée de Samsung One UI retrouve ma voiture à ma place
item.description: Avec l'aide de Google Photos et Maps, l'assistant virtuel Now Brief de votre smartphone Samsung peut vous aider à retrouver où vous êtes garés. Voici comment faire.

item.title: Autonomie XXL : l’Oppo Find X9 Ultra prend la 3e place de notre classement
item.description: Le Oppo Find X9 Ultra se classe 3e dans notre protocole d'autonomie avec 28 heures et 26 minutes d'utilisation. Il surpasse son prédécesseur, l'Oppo Find X9 Pro, de presque une heure malgré une batterie légèrement plus petite. Il devance largement des concurrents comme le Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra et l'iPhone 17 Pro Max en termes d'autonomie.
